gamerule.ig.magnet_enabled.description: Enables or disables the Item Magnet. Default: true.
gamerule.ig.magnet_range.description: The block radius the magnet will attract items from. Range: 1 to 64. Default: 12.
gamerule.ig.magnet_noclip.description: Allows attracted items to pass through solid blocks. Default: true.
gamerule.ig.magnet_affects_xp.descriptio: Whether the magnet should also attract Experience Orbs. Default: true.
gamerule.ig.magnet_particles.description: Spawns particles on items while they are being attracted. Default: true.
gamerule.ig.magnet_particle_count.descri: The number of particles to spawn per item per tick. Range: 0 to 100. Default: 1.
Maximum number of entities allowed to spawn particles simultaneously per tick to prevent lag. Range: 0 to 100. Default: 5.
gamerule.ig.magnet_speed.description: The speed at which items fly towards the player. Range: 1 to 1000. Default: 80%.
gamerule.ig.magnet_acceleration.descript: How quickly items reach maximum speed. Range: 1 to 1000. Default: 10%.
gamerule.ig.magnet_instant.description: If true, items immediately teleport to the player instead of flying. Default: false.
gamerule.ig.magnet_los_only.description: Requires line of sight to attract items. Default: true.
gamerule.ig.magnet_keep_moving_if_unseen: Items continue their momentum if line of sight is broken. Default: true.
gamerule.ig.magnet_blocked_by_transparen: If true, glass and other transparent blocks block line of sight. Default: false.
gamerule.ig.magnet_blocked_by_flora.desc: If true, grass and flowers block line of sight. Default: false.
gamerule.ig.magnet_blocked_by_block_enti: If true, chests and other block entities block line of sight. Default: false.
config.ig_magnet.title: Magnet, Let me get that! Configuration
config.ig_magnet.warning: WARNING: Changes made here only affect the baseline defaults for NEW worlds. To configure your active/existing world, use the in-game /gamerule screen or command instead.
config.ig_magnet.enabled.description:
Enables or disables the Item Magnet. Default: true.

§6Notice:§r Global configuration settings only define default values for newly generated worlds. For existing worlds, change settings in-game via /gamerule or the GameRules edit GUI screen.
config.ig_magnet.range.description:
The block radius the magnet will attract items from. Range: 1 to 64. Default: 12.

§6Notice:§r Global configuration settings only define default values for newly generated worlds. For existing worlds, change settings in-game via /gamerule or the GameRules edit GUI screen.
